next_steps: Brain and leptomeningeal biopsy of the affected cortical regions
MRI of the head with contrast and high-resolution T1/T2/SWI sequences
Dermatologic examination with full-body skin check and dermoscopy
Molecular genetic testing of biopsy tissue for GNAQ/GNA11 mutations
Immunohistochemical staining for markers including HMB-45, Melan-A, and MITF
Positron-emission tomography (PET/CT) to screen for occult primary malignancy
